products.name: Rose Heart Mini Backpack
products.description: Compact pastel backpack with a heart display window, soft ruffles, and side pockets for daily essentials.

products.name: Mint Showcase Tote
products.description: Roomy mint tote with a rectangular clear panel and charm loops for a neat display layout.

products.name: Lavender Lace Crossbody
products.description: Slim shoulder bag with lace-up side trim and a clear display window for a polished collection look.

products.name: Cream Round Window Bag
products.description: Soft cream display bag with a round front window, bow detail, and structured compact body.

products.name: Black Heart Satchel
products.description: Glossy black satchel with a heart-shaped display pocket and refined bow accent.

products.name: Coral Drawstring Pack
products.description: Soft drawstring display pack with rounded front window and flexible daily capacity.

products.name: Sky Frame Crossbody
products.description: Small sky-blue crossbody with a clear rectangular window and clean frame stitching.

products.name: Graphite Grid Backpack
products.description: Dark structured backpack with a grid panel for badges, charms, and small plush accessories.

products.name: Violet Heart Shoulder Bag
products.description: Heart-window shoulder bag in violet with bow trim and a soft rounded silhouette.

products.name: Ivory Collector Case
products.description: Rectangular pouch for pins and charms with soft ivory trim and an easy-access display panel.

products.name: Noir Cat Window Bag
products.description: Black cat-ear display bag with a heart window and polished hardware details.

products.name: Pink Flat Display Panel
products.description: Flat display pouch with stitched rows for arranging badges, acrylic charms, and small accessories.

rose-heart-mini.name: 玫瑰愛心迷你後背包
rose-heart-mini.description: 迷你粉色後背包，搭配愛心展示窗、柔軟荷葉邊與側邊收納口袋。

mint-showcase-tote.name: 薄荷展示托特包
mint-showcase-tote.description: 大容量薄荷托特包，正面透明展示窗適合整齊排放徽章與吊飾。

lavender-lace-crossbody.name: 薰衣草綁帶斜背包
lavender-lace-crossbody.description: 細長肩背包，側邊綁帶與透明展示窗讓收藏更有層次。

cream-round-window.name: 奶油圓窗展示包
cream-round-window.description: 奶油色小包，圓形展示窗、蝴蝶結與挺版包身兼具可愛與質感。

black-heart-satchel.name: 黑色愛心手提包
black-heart-satchel.description: 黑色手提包搭配愛心透明口袋與精緻蝴蝶結，適合深色系收藏。

coral-drawstring-pack.name: 珊瑚抽繩展示包
coral-drawstring-pack.description: 柔軟抽繩款展示包，圓弧透明窗與輕量容量適合日常攜帶。

sky-frame-crossbody.name: 天空藍方窗斜背包
sky-frame-crossbody.description: 小巧天空藍斜背包，方形透明窗與俐落車線適合簡潔展示。

graphite-grid-backpack.name: 石墨黑格紋後背包
graphite-grid-backpack.description: 深色挺版後背包，格紋展示面板可放徽章、吊飾與小娃。

violet-heart-shoulder.name: 紫羅蘭愛心肩背包
violet-heart-shoulder.description: 紫色愛心展示窗肩背包，搭配蝴蝶結與圓潤包型。

ivory-collector-case.name: 象牙白收藏展示包
ivory-collector-case.description: 矩形展示包，可收納徽章與吊飾，柔和象牙白飾邊方便整理。

noir-cat-window.name: 黑貓耳愛心展示包
noir-cat-window.description: 黑色貓耳造型展示包，愛心透明窗與金屬細節帶出個性風格。

pink-flat-panel.name: 粉色平面展示板包
pink-flat-panel.description: 平面展示包，縫線排列方便徽章、壓克力吊飾與小配件定位。

footer.title: 聯繫 showmii
footer.copy: 想詢問商品、現貨、預訂或合作，歡迎透過下方連結聯繫我們。

contact.intro: 選擇你習慣的平台，把商品名稱或截圖傳給 showmii，我們會回覆庫存、金額與寄送方式。

purchase.title: 購買與聯絡方式
purchase.intro: 喜歡的商品可先截圖或複製商品名稱，再透過下方平台詢問現貨、預訂、付款與寄送方式。
purchase.method: 請截圖商品或複製商品名稱，透過 Facebook、Instagram、LINE 或下方任一平台傳給 showmii。我們會回覆庫存、價格、付款與寄送方式，也可以在這裡補充預訂規則或優惠說明。
purchase.note: 實際付款、寄送與預訂細節會依商品狀態與當期活動回覆。

graphite-grid-backpack.description: 深色挺版双肩包，格纹展示面板可放徽章、挂饰与小娃。

footer.title: 联系 showmii
footer.copy: 想询问商品、现货、预订或合作，欢迎通过下方链接联系我们。

contact.intro: 选择你习惯的平台，把商品名称或截图发给 showmii，我们会回复库存、金额与寄送方式。

purchase.title: 购买与联系方式
purchase.intro: 喜欢的商品可先截图或复制商品名称，再通过下方平台询问现货、预订、付款与寄送方式。
purchase.method: 请截图商品或复制商品名称，通过 Facebook、Instagram、LINE 或下方任一平台发给 showmii。我们会回复库存、价格、付款与寄送方式，也可以在这里补充预订规则或优惠说明。
purchase.note: 实际付款、寄送与预订细节会依商品状态与当期活动回复。

footer.title: Contact showmii
footer.copy: For products, stock, preorder, or collaboration questions, reach us through the links below.

contact.intro: Choose your preferred platform and send showmii the product name or screenshot. We will reply with stock, pricing, and shipping details.

purchase.title: How to Buy and Contact
purchase.intro: Screenshot a product or copy its name, then ask about stock, preorder, payment, and shipping through the links below.
purchase.method: Screenshot the product or copy its name, then send it to showmii through Facebook, Instagram, LINE, or any link below. We will reply with stock, price, payment, and shipping details. This note can also include preorder rules or campaign details.
purchase.note: Payment, shipping, and preorder details are confirmed based on product availability and current campaigns.

purchase.title: 購買與聯絡方式
purchase.intro: 喜歡的商品可先截圖或複製商品名稱，再透過下方平台詢問現貨、預訂、付款與寄送方式。

purchase.note: 實際付款、寄送與預訂細節會依商品狀態與當期活動回覆。
